utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: So , I hear , you hate me !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I , ah , I never said hate , I was very careful about that .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: A little birdie told me something about you wanting to rip your arm off and throw it at me .

emotion_cause.span: 3_you wanting to rip your arm off and throw it at me .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And you got a hate from that ? ! Your taking a big leap there ...

emotion_cause.span: 4_you got a hate from that ? ! Your taking a big leap there ...

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: All right , fine , fine , fine , fine , fine , we have got to do something about our little situation here Joey .

emotion_cause.span: 4_you got a hate from that ? ! Your taking a big leap there ...

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: So , this is my idea : you and me spending some quality time together .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But what does that gonna do ...
